Subject: Cannot log in
Description: I keep getting "invalid credentials" even with the right password.
Resolution: Have the customer reset their password from Settings -> Security. The reset link is valid for 30 minutes.

Subject: Where is my refund
Description: I returned an item last week but haven't seen the money.
Resolution: Refunds go back to the original payment method within five business days. Confirmed the refund was issued.

Subject: Change VAT number on invoice
Description: Our company VAT number is wrong on the invoice.
Resolution: Update VAT details under Settings -> Billing -> Payment method; invoices regenerate automatically.

Subject: Feature request: dark mode
Description: It would be great to have a dark theme.

Subject: Package not delivered
Description: My order shipped 8 days ago and still hasn't arrived.
Resolution: Opened a carrier investigation using the tracking number from the Orders page; reship if unrecovered in 3 days.
